title: vaccinium ceraceum
intro:
Vaccinium ceraceum, also known as the creeping bilberry or alpine bilberry, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe.

This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions due to its high content of anthocyanins and other antioxidants. The health benefits of Vaccinium ceraceum include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Vaccinium ceraceum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
